Tests the behavior of Math.max() with no arguments, expecting -Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `Math.max` function when called without arguments. The assertion checks that `Math.max()` returns `-Infinity`, which is the expected result according to the ECMAScript specification. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on validating this specific behavior of the `Math.max` function. The use of an assertion indicates that this code is likely part of a test suite to ensure the correctness of mathematical operations in a JavaScript environment.
